text:
ASUS: M2NBP-VM CSM
NVIDIA Quadro® NVS 210S+NVIDIA nForce® 430B

Functional: 
- On-board Marvel LAN works without problems
- On-board Graphics functional
- SATA detected und tested
- boot from mirror (gmirror) without any problems
- on-board sound: untested
